The Reality

Indian retail is fighting a two-front war

Supermarkets on price. Quick-commerce on speed. Independent retail stores are losing — not because they're inferior, but because they're operating without data and technology.

01
📦
Chronic Stockouts

Buying on guesswork means your bestsellers run out while slow movers pile up. Customers go to Blinkit once — and don't come back.

02
💸
Margin Leakage

Without purchase data you can't negotiate. Without expiry tracking you write off stock. Without analytics you discount the wrong items.

03
🧾
GST & Compliance Risk

Manual billing means errors in GST filing. A single tax notice can cost more than a year of consulting fees.

04
📊
Zero Business Visibility

No daily P&L. No product velocity data. No customer purchase history. You're running a ₹50L/year business blindfolded.

05
🚚
Supplier Dependency

Without automated POs and vendor scorecards, suppliers control you. Lead times slip, fill rates fall.

06
📱
Invisible Online

13 million kirana stores, yet barely 2% are on ONDC. Your best customers can't order from you at midnight.

13M+
Retail Stores in India
88%
Without Any POS System
₹2T

90d

Who We Serve

Built for every layer of Indian retail

From a single kirana store to a pan-India FMCG distributor — our services are tailored to the specific needs, budgets and goals of each customer segment.

🏬

2–20 outlet grocery and supermarket chains in Tier 1 & 2 cities looking to centralise operations, pricing and procurement across outlets.

🚀

What We Do

Four service lines. One complete transformation.

From a single kirana store's first POS setup to a full roadmap of Legacy system-to-Zoho migration — we cover the entire spectrum of retail supply chain digitisation.

01
Bread & Butter · Primary Revenue Driver
Zoho POS Implementation
Full end-to-end Zoho POS deployment — from needs assessment to go-live and post-implementation support. Available in three packages for every business size.
🏪
Starter
Single outlet POS setup, basic inventory, staff training
₹15,000 – ₹25,000 one-time
  • Single outlet POS setup & configuration
  • Up to 500 SKU product catalogue
  • GST mapping & billing setup
  • Staff training (owner + 2 staff)
  • 30-day WhatsApp support
Most Popular
Growth
Multi-outlet (up to 5), PO management, reports
₹40,000 – ₹75,000 + ₹5K/month AMC
  • Up to 5 outlets under one account
  • Central product & price master
  • Supplier PO management module
  • Automated reorder alerts
  • Sales & inventory dashboards
  • Monthly health-check support
Enterprise Retail
Chain retailers, full SCM integration, custom workflows
₹1,00,000 – ₹1,50,000 + ₹15K/month AMC
  • Unlimited outlets rollout
  • Full SCM integration
  • Custom workflows & SOPs
  • Legacy SCM / Tally migration
  • Zoho Analytics advanced dashboards
  • Dedicated account manager
02
High Value · Project & Retainer
Supply Chain Consulting
Leveraging 20 years of Enterprise ERP Implementation expertise to advise mid-market and large retailers on supply chain strategy, vendor rationalisation, demand forecasting and inventory optimisation.
🔗
📦
Inventory Optimisation & Demand Planning
₹50,000 – ₹2,00,000 per project

ABC-XYZ analysis, reorder point design, safety stock calculation and demand forecasting model for your top SKUs.

🤝
Vendor Management & Procurement Strategy
₹75,000 – ₹3,00,000 per project

Vendor rationalisation, supplier scorecards, contract management, negotiation frameworks and procurement SOP design.

🗺️
Supply Chain Digital Roadmap
₹1,50,000 – ₹5,00,000 per engagement

Current-state audit, gap analysis, technology selection and 12-month transformation roadmap with prioritised quick wins.

📅
Monthly Retainer — Ongoing Advisory
₹25,000 – ₹75,000 per month

Dedicated SCM advisor on retainer — monthly reviews, performance reporting and continuous optimisation guidance.

03
Niche · Only We Can Do This in India
Legacy SCM → Zoho Migration
Retailers and distributors running legacy system or platform who want to right-size to Zoho. A niche service only Pro SCM Consultancy can credibly offer in India.
🔄
LEGACYDesktop / Cloud
Pro SCM Migration
ZOHOPOS / Inventory / Books
Migration Assessment & Gap Analysis
₹50,000 – ₹1,00,000

Detailed mapping of your Legacy configuration to Zoho equivalents. Data migration plan, risk assessment, go-live strategy.

Full Migration Project
₹2,00,000 – ₹10,00,000

End-to-end migration: data extraction, cleansing, transformation and loading into Zoho. Parallel run, cutover and hypercare.

04
Capability Building · Passive Income
Training & Capability Building
Hands-on training that sticks. We build internal capability so your team is self-sufficient — not dependent on consultants forever.
🎓
🏢
Zoho POS Corporate Workshop
₹10,000 – ₹30,000 per session

On-site training for store managers and staff. Covers billing, inventory, reporting and daily reconciliation workflows.

📋
Supply Chain for Retail Managers
₹5,000 per person (batch of 10–20)

SCM fundamentals: demand planning, procurement, inventory discipline (FIFO, reorder levels), vendor management and GST compliance SOPs.

💻
Online Self-Paced Courses
₹999 – ₹2,999 per course

Self-paced Zoho POS courses for Indian retail on Udemy and our own portal. Learn at your own pace, in your own language.

Our Technology Platform

Why we chose Zoho for Indian retail

Zoho offers Indian retail businesses to digitize operations by integrating billing, inventory, accounting, and POS billing through solutions like Zoho Inventory, Zoho Books, and Zoho POS.

Official Zoho Consulting Partner

Pro SCM Consultancy is a Official Zoho Consulting Partner — trained, tested and endorsed by Zoho India. Every implementation we deliver meets Zoho's quality standards.

100%
Cloud SaaS Framework
50K+
Indian Businesses on Zoho
₹799
Zoho POS Starting / Month
100%
GST & India Tax Compliant
🇮🇳
Built for India, by an Indian Company

Zoho is headquartered in Chennai. GST, UPI, Indian tax slabs, Hindi and regional language interfaces — all built-in natively, not bolted on.

📶
Works Offline — Critical for Indian Retail

Zoho POS continues working during internet outages. Billing never stops. Data syncs automatically when connectivity returns.

💸
Affordable — ₹799/Month vs ₹50,000+/Month for Enterprise ERP Package

A full Zoho POS + Inventory + Books stack costs less than the annual support fee of most ERP systems. High power, SME-friendly price.

🔗
Integrated Ecosystem — One Platform, Everything Connected

POS, Inventory, Accounting, CRM, E-commerce and Analytics all talk to each other natively. No integration costs, no data silos.

📱
Runs on Any Android Tablet or Laptop

No expensive dedicated hardware required. Your existing Android tablet becomes a full-featured POS terminal.

Zoho Modules We Implement
🏪
Zoho POS

Billing, inventory, customer management and daily reports. Works on Android tablet, offline-capable, GST-ready.

Core Module
📦
Zoho Inventory

Multi-warehouse inventory management, purchase orders, supplier management and serial/batch tracking.

Supply Chain
📒
Zoho Books

Full GST accounting, automated bank reconciliation, P&L, balance sheet and GST filing-ready reports.

Finance & GST
🛍️
Zoho Commerce

Online storefront integrated with your POS inventory. Unified stock across physical and online channels. ONDC-ready.

E-Commerce
📊
Zoho Analytics

Advanced dashboards, SKU profitability analysis, demand forecasting and automated management reports.

Business Intelligence
🔌
3rd Party Integrations

Swiggy, Zomato, ONDC, Shiprocket, Razorpay, PayTM and WhatsApp Business — all connected to your Zoho.

Integrations
How It Works

From sign-up to go-live in 4 steps

Our 4D Delivery Framework ensures every engagement delivers measurable results — not just a software installation.

01
Discover
Free Business Audit

We visit your store, map your processes, identify your top 3 pain points and calculate your potential ROI — before you spend anything.

02
Design
Custom Solution Plan

We design a solution architecture specific to your business — right modules, right configuration, right sequence. No generic templates.

03
Deploy
Implementation & Go-Live

We set up, configure, migrate data, train your team, and stay on-site for go-live day. Most implementations complete in 5–10 working days.

04
Drive
Support & Optimise

30-day hypercare support, monthly performance reviews and ongoing AMC to ensure your system keeps delivering measurable results.

The Pro SCM difference

There are many IT vendors. There is only one consulting firm that combines end-to-end ERP digital transformation expertise with a 100% Indian retail focus and official Zoho partnership.

20
🎓
Enterprise SCM Depth

Founded by an IIM Trichy alumnus with 20 years of Enterprise ERP Implementation Expertise across Energy, Retail, Utilities & Hi-Tech sectors globally. Enterprise-grade thinking at SME-friendly prices.

01
🤝
Official Zoho Partner

We are an Offical Zoho Consulting Partner — trained, tested and endorsed by Zoho. Guaranteed implementation quality and access to Zoho's India support ecosystem.

∞
🇮🇳
India-First Approach

We understand kirana economics, GST nuances, cash-heavy operations, regional supplier dynamics and the specific threat of Blinkit/Zepto to your business.

05
⚡
Fast, On-Site Delivery

Most implementations go live in 5 working days. We come to your store — not remote-only delivery. Training happens in your language, in your environment.

90
💰
ROI in 90 Days

Every engagement includes an ROI projection before you sign. Typical clients recover their full investment within 45–90 days through stockout reduction and margin improvement.

4D
🔄
Proven Framework

Our 4D Framework (Discover → Design → Deploy → Drive) is a battle-tested methodology that ensures consistent outcomes across every engagement regardless of size.

About Us

We exist to give small retail a fighting chance

PRO SCM CONSULTANCY is India's dedicated retail supply chain digitization firm. We saw a massive gap: powerful technology exists, but most retail stores could never adopt it without affordable, hands-on implementation support. We bridge that gap.

🎯
Simplicity

Solutions store owners can actually use — not software that gathers dust.

💹
Profitability

Every recommendation must improve your margins. Full stop.

📊
Transparency

Measurable KPIs and dashboards. You always know the numbers.

🌱
Partnership

We grow only when our clients grow. Your success is our metric.
